sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 코스트코 2026 회계연도 3분기 매출은 전년 대비 11.6% 증가한 691억 5,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 순매출은 691억 5,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 11.6% 성장했습니다.
3분기 순이익은 21억 9,000만 달러(주당 4.93달러)로 전년 동기 19억 달러(주당 4.28달러) 대비 증가했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 현재 전 세계적으로 총 931개의 창고형 매장을 운영 중입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 회계연도 첫 36주간 누적 순매출은 2,033억 7,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 9.6% 증가했습니다.
회계연도 첫 36주간 누적 순이익은 62억 3,000만 달러(주당 14.01달러)를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 실적 발표에서 환율 변동 및 휘발유 가격 변화가 제외된 동일 매장 매출 성장세가 지속되는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 costex9918-k52826.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Press Release COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION REPORTS THIRD QUARTER AND YEAR-TO-DATE OPERATING RESULTS FOR FISCAL 2026 ISSAQUAH, Wash., May 28, 2026 - Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today announced its operating results for the third quarter (twelve weeks) and the first 36 weeks of fiscal 2026, ended May 10, 2026. Net sales for the quarter increased 11.6 percent, to $69.15 billion, from $61.96 billion last year. Net sales for the first 36 weeks increased 9.6 percent, to $203.37 billion, from $185.48 billion last year. Comparable sales for the third quarter and first 36 weeks of fiscal 2026 were as follows: 1  Normalized numeric aliases: $69.15 billion = 691억 5,000만 달러; $61.96 billion = 619억 6,000만 달러; $203.37 billion = 2,033억 7,000만 달러; $185.48 billion = 1,854억 8,000만 달러; $69.15 = 69.15달러; $61.96 = 61.96달러; $203.37 = 203.37달러; $185.48 = 185.48달러; 11.6 percent = 11.6%; 9.6 percent = 9.6%.

igitally-Enabled 21.5% 20.8% 21.6% 21.1% *Excluding the impacts from changes in gasoline prices and foreign exchange. Net income for the quarter was $2.19 billion, $4.93 per diluted share, compared to $1.90 billion, $4.28 per diluted share, last year. Net income for the first 36 weeks was $6.23 billion, $14.01 per diluted share, compared to $5.49 billion, $12.34 per diluted share, last year. Costco currently operates 931 warehouses, including 639 in the United States and Puerto Rico, 115 in Canada, 43 in Mexico, 37 in Japan, 29 in the United Kingdom, 20 in Korea, 15 in Australia, 14 in Taiwan, seven in China, five in Spain, three in France, two in Sweden, and one each in Iceland, and New Zealand. Costco also oper  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.19 billion = 21억 9,000만 달러; $1.90 billion = 19억 달러; $6.23 billion = 62억 3,000만 달러; $5.49 billion = 54억 9,000만 달러; $2.19 = 2.19달러; $4.93 = 4.93달러; $1.90 = 1.90달러; $4.28 = 4.28달러; $6.23 = 6.23달러; $14.01 = 14.01달러; $5.49 = 5.49달러; $12.34 = 12.34달러.
